## 📚 Documentation Issue

A clear description of the documentation issue.

## 📍 Location

**File/URL**: [e.g., README.md, docs/api.md]

**Section**: [e.g., Installation, API Reference]

## ❌ Current Documentation

```markdown
Paste current documentation that needs improvement
```

## ✅ Suggested Improvement

```markdown
Paste your suggested improvement
```

## 🎯 Why This Matters

Explain why this documentation improvement is needed:

- [ ] Information is incorrect/outdated
- [ ] Information is missing
- [ ] Examples needed
- [ ] Clarity can be improved
- [ ] Typo/grammar fix

## 📋 Additional Context

Add any other context about the documentation issue.
